moodEntries.notes: Aced my math midterm after feeling super anxious last week. Grounding skills with Box Breathing really helped!
Exhausted from studying late for English. Tried to stay positive.
Had a great hanging out session with friends. Realized that taking a break is totally fine.
Felt really swamped with history essays and exam prep. Need to plan things better.

journalEntries.title: Finding my rhythm
journalEntries.content: Writing is my escape from pressure. Today I realized my thoughts don't define my worth. Stressed is just a feeling, and it will pass.

journalEntries.title: Family Dinner Calmness
journalEntries.content: Usually dinners with family are chaotic, but today we actually laughed without fighting about clean bedrooms or TikTok times. I am grateful for that moment.

contactRequests.name: Sam Roberts
contactRequests.subject: Inquiry about high school support partnerships
contactRequests.message: Hello TeenSphere team! I love what you are building. Do you offer bulk integrations or materials for high school wellness counselors?

helplines.name: 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline
helplines.description: Free, confidential support for people in distress, prevention and crisis resources.

helplines.name: Crisis Text Line
helplines.description: Crisis Text Line provides free, 24/7 high-quality text-based crisis intervention.

helplines.name: The Trevor Project
helplines.description: Crisis intervention and suicide prevention services for lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender, queer & questioning (LGBTQ) young people.

helplines.name: National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
helplines.description: Support, resources, and treatment options for individual and family members struggling with eating disorders.

helplines.name: Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services (SAMHSA)
helplines.description: Free, confidential, 24/7 treatment referral and information service in English and Spanish.
